input_schema.description: A cat picture to evaluate for frame dominance.
A cat picture to evaluate for proportional presence within the frame.
A cat picture to evaluate for positional authority within the frame.
A cat picture to evaluate for visual clarity as the unambiguous subject.

description: Evaluates how completely a cat commands the physical space of a photograph. Scores three qualities — proportional presence, positional authority, and visual clarity — to answer one question: is this picture actually about the cat? Returns a score from 0 (marginal, obscured, peripheral) to 1 (undeniable focal point).
